---
name: Verification Gap or Citation Audit
about: Report a stale claim, citation problem, broken link, or unverifiable statement.
title: "[verification]: "
labels: ["verification"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What is currently unverifiable, inconsistent, or outdated?

## Affected Reference or Section

List the reference number, BibTeX key, or document section when possible.

## Evidence of the Problem

Include the DOI mismatch, broken URL, contradictory source, or audit output.

## Suggested Fix

Describe the smallest useful correction.

## Reproduction Notes

Include commands such as `python3 scripts/verify_references.py` if relevant.
